Write a 900-word white paper introduction titled "What AI Takes From Agencies (And What It Can't)."

Audience: CMOs at consumer brands who are being pressured to increase content output without growing headcount.
Tone: analytical, near-neutral, a little skeptical, never breathless.
Format: white paper intro.
Constraints:
- Do not use hype language.
- Do not invent data.
- Keep the focus on agency work, not general AI ethics.
- Mention that Gartner estimates 30% of outbound messages will be AI-generated by 2025.
- End with the tension: AI can automate output, but it cannot own judgment, politics, or trust.
Success rubric:
- Feels executive-ready.
- Preserves nuance.
- Sounds human.
